title: ligularia caloxantha
intro: Ligularia caloxantha is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the family Asteraceae, commonly known as the daisy or sunflower family. The plant is native to China and is also known as the "giant leopards bane" due to its large, leathery leaves and bright yellow flowers. Ligularia caloxantha has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant can be used in herbal preparations such as teas and infusions to alleviate health issues such as fever, sore throats, and skin conditions, as well as to boost the immune system and support digestive health.
